workspace_crates.name: uselesskey
workspace_crates.description: Public facade — re-exports all key types and traits behind feature flags

workspace_crates.description: Deterministic webhook fixtures for GitHub, Stripe, and Slack signature tests

workspace_crates.name: uselesskey-x509
workspace_crates.description: X.509 self-signed certificates and certificate chains

workspace_crates.name: uselesskey-cli
workspace_crates.description: Command-line fixture generation, bundling, and export helpers

workspace_crates.name: uselesskey-test-server
workspace_crates.description: Deterministic OIDC discovery and JWKS HTTP test server fixtures

adapter_crates.description: `axum` auth-test helpers with deterministic JWKS/OIDC routes

runnable_examples.name: adapter_jsonwebtoken
runnable_examples.description: Sign and verify JWTs using `jsonwebtoken` crate integration

runnable_examples.name: adapter_rustls
runnable_examples.description: Convert X.509 fixtures into rustls `ServerConfig` / `ClientConfig`

runnable_examples.name: basic_ecdsa
runnable_examples.description: Generate ECDSA keypairs for P-256 and P-384 in PEM, DER, JWK

runnable_examples.name: basic_ed25519
runnable_examples.description: Generate Ed25519 keypairs in PEM, DER, and JWK formats

runnable_examples.name: basic_hmac
runnable_examples.description: Generate HMAC secrets for HS256, HS384, and HS512

runnable_examples.name: basic_rsa
runnable_examples.description: Generate RSA keypairs in PEM, DER, and JWK formats

runnable_examples.name: basic_token
runnable_examples.description: Generate API key, bearer token, and OAuth access-token fixtures

runnable_examples.name: basic_usage
runnable_examples.description: All-in-one: RSA, ECDSA, and Ed25519 fixture generation

runnable_examples.name: deterministic
runnable_examples.description: Reproducible fixtures from seeds - same seed always yields the same key

runnable_examples.name: deterministic_mode
runnable_examples.description: Order-independent deterministic derivation guarantees

runnable_examples.name: jwk_generation
runnable_examples.description: Build JWKs and JWKS with `JwksBuilder` across key types

runnable_examples.name: jwk_jwks
runnable_examples.description: JWK sets from multiple key types with metadata inspection

runnable_examples.name: jwks
runnable_examples.description: Build a JWKS from RSA and ECDSA public keys

runnable_examples.name: jwks_server_mock
runnable_examples.description: Generate a JWKS response body for a mock `/.well-known/jwks.json` endpoint

runnable_examples.name: jwt_rs256_jwks
runnable_examples.description: RSA keypairs with JWK/JWKS extraction for JWT verification flows

runnable_examples.name: jwt_signing
runnable_examples.description: JWT signing with deterministic RSA, ECDSA, and HMAC keys (ECDSA/HMAC optional)

runnable_examples.name: negative_fixtures
runnable_examples.description: Intentionally invalid certificates and keys for error-path testing

runnable_examples.name: negative_payload_shapes
runnable_examples.description: Scanner-safe negative JWK/JWKS and token shapes for validator tests

runnable_examples.name: tempfile_paths
runnable_examples.description: Write key fixtures to temporary files for path-based APIs

runnable_examples.name: tempfiles
runnable_examples.description: Write X.509 cert, key, and identity PEM to temp files

runnable_examples.name: tls_server
runnable_examples.description: Certificate chain generation for TLS server testing

runnable_examples.name: token_generation
runnable_examples.description: Realistic API keys, bearer tokens, and OAuth tokens for tests

runnable_examples.name: x509_certificates
runnable_examples.description: Self-signed certs, cert chains, and negative X.509 fixtures

minimal_example_commands.name: Token fixtures
